description: Remove the retired compiler2 export path once interface facts own visibility. Delete `ModuleExport`, `module_exports`, `find_export`, and the duplicated import/require selection helpers. Update telemetry and docs to state the new boundary: `ModuleDefined` is local body/scoping readiness, `ModuleInterface` is cross-module callable visibility. Signal: the old export-selection path is gone, docs match the code, and compiler2 tests prove the interface boundary directly.
title: Compiler2 interface closeout: delete ModuleExport path, update telemetry, and restate the invariants
